task_completion.description: Apply resource limits and restart policy to acme-api container.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing a command like 'docker update --memory 256m --cpus 0.5 --restart unless-stopped acme-api' or 'docker inspect' output confirming these values.

task_completion.description: Apply resource limits and restart policy to acme-worker container.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing a command like 'docker update --memory 512m --cpus 1.0 --restart on-failure:3 acme-worker' or 'docker inspect' output confirming these values.

task_completion.description: Apply resource limits and restart policy to acme-cache container.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing a command like 'docker update --memory 128m --cpus 0.25 --restart always acme-cache' or 'docker inspect' output confirming these values.

task_completion.description: Perform a stress test on acme-worker to trigger an Out-Of-Memory (OOM) kill.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Terminal showing a memory-consuming command executed inside the container (e.g., 'docker exec acme-worker stress --vm 1 --vm-bytes 1G') or 'docker inspect acme-worker' showing '"OOMKilled": true'.

task_completion.description: Document the applied limits and stress test results in a markdown file.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor (e.g., nano, vim, gedit) or terminal output ('cat') showing the contents of 'resource_governance.md' with the limits for all three containers and a description of the stress test results.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent actually executed Docker commands to update the containers.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for executed 'docker update' commands in the terminal history, ensuring the agent didn't just write the markdown documentation without applying the changes.

integrity.description: Verify that the OOM kill was triggered by a genuine stress test.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for evidence of a memory stress tool or script being run (e.g., stress, stress-ng, /dev/zero allocation) rather than the agent simply running 'docker kill' or 'docker stop' to fake a restart.

integrity.description: Verify the documentation file is saved in the correct location.
integrity.visual_evidence: The file path visible in the text editor's title bar, status bar, or terminal prompt must clearly indicate '~/Desktop/resource_governance.md' or '/home/ga/Desktop/resource_governance.md'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: acme-api: 256MB (268435456 bytes), 0.5 CPUs (500000000 nano_cpus), restart 'unless-stopped'. acme-worker: 512MB (536870912 bytes), 1.0 CPUs (1000000000 nano_cpus), restart 'on-failure' with max 3 retries. acme-cache: 128MB (134217728 bytes), 0.25 CPUs (250000000 nano_cpus), restart 'always'. Documentation must be located exactly at /home/ga/Desktop/resource_governance.md.
